title: Data and Codes from: Protocol for assisting frequency band definition and decoding neural dynamics using hierarchical clustering and multivariate pattern analysis
author: Li, Chengpeng
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
README  
 This repository contains sample data, sample code, and custom toolboxes to accompany the protocol "Protocol for assisting frequency band definition and decoding neural dynamics using hierarchical clustering and multivariate pattern analysis" by Li, Hasegawa, and Tanigawa. 
  Repository Contents  
 - sample_data: This folder contains sample electrocorticography (ECoG) data recorded from the prefrontal cortex (PFC) of a macaque monkey. The data is provided in MATLAB format (.mat). Please refer to the protocol for detailed information about the experimental procedures and data preprocessing. - sample_code: This folder contains example MATLAB scripts demonstrating the key steps of the protocol. These scripts are intended to be used in conjunction with the sample data and the custom toolboxes. - toolbox: This folder contains custom MATLAB programs required for running the sample code. 
  Note:  
 - The sample data provided is a small subset of the full dataset used in the original study (Tanigawa et al., 2022). 
 Tanigawa H, Majima K, Takei R, Kawasaki K, Sawahata H, Nakahara K, Iijima A, Suzuki T, Kamitani Y, Hasegawa I. 2022. Decoding distributed oscillatory signals driven by memory and perception in the prefrontal cortex. Cell Reports. 39:110676. 
 - The sample code is for demonstration purposes and may need to be adapted for your own data. - Please refer to the main protocol paper for detailed information about the methods, parameters, and interpretation of the results. 
  Contact  
 For any questions or issues regarding this repository, please contact: 
 Hisashi Tanigawa, Ph.D. (hisashi.q@gmail.com)
